name: Stewed Fruits
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients together in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Bring the liquid to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to as low as possible and cook, covered, until the fruit is softened and tender, about 2 hours. Stir the fruits occasionally while they cook.
4. Alternatively, if you have a crockpot, stir all the ingredients together in it and cook until the fruit is tender, 6 to 8 hours.
5. Serve the fruit warm or at room temperature.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
Loomis recommends using the crockpot method for enhanced flavor depth. She suggests serving this dish as brunch on its own, over waffles or pancakes, or as dessert with vanilla or cinnamon ice cream. It can also be enjoyed as a sweet snack.
